# netbox_converter dependencies.
#
# networkx — used by the placement logic (netbox_layout.py), a faithful port of
# the offline Network Sketcher tool, for graph centrality metrics and
# connected-component ("network group") detection.
networkx>=3.0

# Everything else is the Python standard library (3.10+):
#   argparse, csv, json, pathlib, re, ssl, sys, urllib,
#   collections, dataclasses, typing
